name: Pumpkin Praline Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, blend pumpkin, condensed milk, eggs, spices, and salt; pour into pastry shell.
3. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
4. Arrange pecans in a circle on top of the pie.
5. In a small saucepan, combine remaining ingredients; cook and stir until sugar dissolves. Simmer for 5 minutes, then remove from heat.
6. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before spooning over the pecans.
7. Refrigerate leftover pie. Makes one 9-inch pie.
